page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8ae.4xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs utilizing the x86_64 architecture, specifically the AMD EPYC 9T34 processor running at 3.4 GHz. The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core capabilities, with stress-ng single-core CPU performance ranking in the top tier (top 10%) and Geekbench single-core scores in the strong category (top 25%). Multi-core performance, including stress-ng multi-core and Geekbench multi-core, falls within the average range. Text processing is a notable strength, achieving top-tier performance. Memory performance is also strong, as evidenced by its PassMark memory score, though uncached read and write bandwidths remain in the average tier.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density provide a stable environment for memory-bound workloads without the overhead of hyperthreading, as there is exactly one thread per physical core. The lack of bundled local storage and GPUs makes this instance a cost-effective choice for workloads that prioritize RAM capacity and single-core execution speed over local disk performance or parallel graphics processing.

This instance is well-suited for memory-intensive applications such as database operations, caching layers like Redis, text processing pipelines, and enterprise applications that require a high RAM-to-CPU ratio.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8ae.4xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 16 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs and 16 physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 9T34 processor running at 3.4 GHz. With 128.0 GB of RAM, it delivers a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators but provides a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps. Benchmark results show top-tier single-core CPU and text processing performance, alongside strong memory performance. Multi-core and database operations perform at average levels. This hardware profile makes the instance highly suitable for memory-intensive workloads, database hosting, and text processing applications that benefit from dedicated core allocations and high memory density without the need for local NVMe storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8ae.4xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 16 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 12 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering top-tier single-core and text processing performance.

tagline: A memory-optimized instance featuring dedicated AMD EPYC cores and high memory density for demanding database and text processing workloads.

128.0 GB of RAM providing 8.0 GB per core for memory-bound tasks
Top-tier single-core CPU and text processing benchmark performance
12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage or GPUs
Optimized for database hosting, caching layers, and text processing
